parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Page size specified in get user contact list request. Default value is 10.

parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: Page index specified in get user contact list request. Default value is 1.

parameters.name: SearchKey
parameters.description: Contacts can be listed by the search  based on the Name or Email

parameters.name: ContactType
parameters.description: Contact type whether the contact is My Contacts or All Contacts. Default value is AllContacts.

get.summary: List the custom fields respective to the brand id.

post.summary: Generates a URL for creating or modifying custom fields within your application's embedded Designer.

parameters.name: BrandId
parameters.description: The Brand ID for custom fields must be configured

parameters.name: LinkValidTill
parameters.description: This property is used to set the validity of the generated URL. Its maximum validity is 30 days

requestBody.description: The send for sign request body.

patch.summary: Extends the expiration date of the document.

requestBody.description: The new expiry value should be specified in yyyy-MM-dd format for days type, ISO date time format for specific date time and integer for hours type.

post.summary: Generates a send URL which embeds document sending process into your application.

requestBody.description: The embedded send document request body.

post.summary: Generates an embedded edit URL that allows the document editing process to be integrated into your application.

requestBody.description: The embedded edit document request body.

parameters.name: DateFilterType
parameters.description: Date Filter as SentBetween and ExpiresOn.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Page size specified in get document list request.

parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: Page index specified in get document list request.

parameters.name: Status
parameters.description: Status of the document such as In-progress, Completed, Decline, Expired, Revoked, Draft.

parameters.name: SearchKey
parameters.description: Documents can be listed by the search key present in the document like document title, document ID, sender or recipient(s) name, etc.,

parameters.name: NextCursor
parameters.description: Next cursor value for pagination, required for fetching the next set of documents beyond 10,000 records.

parameters.name: TransmitType
parameters.description: Transmit type as Sent, Received and Both.

parameters.name: DateFilterType
parameters.description: Date Filter as SentBetween and Expiring.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Page size specified in get document list request.

parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: Page index specified in get document list request.

parameters.name: Status
parameters.description: Status of the document such as In-progress, Completed, Decline, Expired, Revoked, Draft.

parameters.name: SearchKey
parameters.description: Documents can be listed by the search key present in the document like document title, document ID, sender or recipient(s) name, etc.,

parameters.name: NextCursor
parameters.description: Next cursor value for pagination, required for fetching the next set of documents beyond 10,000 records.

parameters.name: PageType
parameters.description: The filter used to differentiate between documents sent on the user's behalf and documents sent by the user on behalf of others. The API will return documents based on the specified value.

parameters.name: EmailAddress
parameters.description: The sender identity's email used to filter the documents returned in the API. The API will return documents that were sent on behalf of the specified email address.

parameters.name: Signers
parameters.description: A list of signer email addresses used to filter the documents returned in the API. The API will return documents where the signer's email address matches one of the email addresses provided in this list

parameters.description: Page size specified in get document list request.

parameters.name: Page

parameters.name: Status
parameters.description: Status of the document such as In-progress, Completed, Decline, Expired, Revoked, Draft.

parameters.name: SearchKey
parameters.description: Documents can be listed by the search key present in the document like document title, document ID, sender or recipient(s) name, etc.,

parameters.name: NextCursor
parameters.description: Next cursor value for pagination, required for fetching the next set of documents beyond 10,000 records.

parameters.name: attachmentId
parameters.description: Attachment Id(Get attachment ID from Properties API).

Change recipient details of a document.

Contains DocumentId and LabelNames for Adding Tags.

patch.summary: Remove the access code for the given document signer.

parameters.description: Document ID of the signature request

post.summary: Sends a draft-status document out for signature.

parameters.description: The ID of the document to be sent.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Page size specified in get user group contact list request. Default value is 10.

parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: Page index specified in get user group contact list request. Default value is 1.

parameters.name: SearchKey
parameters.description: Group Contacts can be listed by the search  based on the Name or Email

parameters.name: ContactType
parameters.description: Group Contact type whether the contact is my contacts or all contacts. Default value is AllContacts.

parameters.name: Directories
parameters.description: Group Contacts can be listed by the search  based on the directories

get.summary: Get Summary of the Group Contact.

post.summary: Retrieve the ID verification report for the specified document signer.
Retrieve the uploaded ID verification document or selfie image for the specified document signer using the file ID.
Generate a URL that embeds manual ID verification for the specified document signer into your application.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Page size specified in get sender identity list request.

parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: Page index specified in get sender identity request.

parameters.name: Search
parameters.description: Users can be listed by the search key present in the sender identity like sender identity name and email address

parameters.description: A list of brand IDs to filter associated with the sender identity.

get.summary: Gets sender identity by ID or email.

parameters.description: Page index specified in get team list request.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Page size specified in get team list request.

parameters.name: SearchKey
parameters.description: Teams can be listed by the search key

parameters.name: OnBehalfOf
parameters.description: The sender identity's email used to filter the templates returned in the API. The API will return templates that were sent on behalf of the specified email address.

parameters.name: CreatedBy
parameters.description: The templates can be listed by the creator of the template.

parameters.name: SharedWithTeamId
parameters.description: The templates can be listed by the shared teams.
